meaning: adj.统治的,支配的,主导的,流行的,占统治地位的n.统治,支配,裁决,划线
examples: The ruling should be applied retroactively.
The company is appealing against the ruling.
Goodwin tried to have the court ruling overturned.
This ruling prompted Harris to demand written statements from the counties explaining their reasons for recounting.
The ruling was significant because it covered sales to French users even from Yahoo!'
